TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Arisan go mki sku Kagi Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 468.34 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 389.79 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 83.84 km¬≤), 4,081 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,373 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,459 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 85%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Cou ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Arisan go ays psgayun 12 ru 8 alang. 8 alang hani ga, Niae' ucna , Tapang Č , Tfuya , Lalauya , Pnguu , Saviki , Sinvi , Cayamavana . tuqi 'san ungat kisya' nya'. "Taywan hawsing" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'.
S.PHON: aris~…ēan …£o mki s~…ēku ka…£i keŇč. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na ¶~ ®ou ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u aris~…ēan …£o ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun ** ru * alaŇč. * alaŇč ńßani …£a, niae Ē u ¶~ ®na , tapaŇč* , t*uja , lalauja , pŇčuu , s~…ēa*iki , s~…ēin*i , ¶~ ®ajama*ana . tuqi Ēs~…ēan uŇčat kis~…ēja Ē nja Ē. "tajwan ńßaws~…ēiŇč" qu s~…ēpzjaŇč …£l…£aŇč nńßa qalaŇč mus~…ēa Ē ana inu Ē.
S.FORM: Arisan go mki sku Kagi Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 468.34 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 389.79 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 83.84 km¬≤), 4,081 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,373 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,459 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 85%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Cou ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Arisan go ays psgayun 12 ru 8 alang. 8 alang hani ga, Niae' ucna , Tapang Č , Tfuya , Lalauya , Pnguu , Saviki , Sinvi , Cayamavana . tuqi 'san ungat kisya' nya'. "Taywan hawsing" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'.

"tajwan ńßaws~…ēiŇč" qu s~…ēpzjaŇč …£l…£aŇč nńßa qalaŇč mus~…ēa Ē ana inu Ē.
